descriptionHtml:
Bali 5.2 for sale 2025 | 4 Cabins Owner's Version | Tax Not Paid

NEW - Fully equipped

Cancelled order sold with guarantee at a very interesting price. Introducing the Bali 5.2 for sale 2025 – a brand-new model thoughtfully specified to provide comfortable long-distance cruising and effortless living aboard. This 4-cabin, 4-head configuration is designed for owners seeking both space and flexibility, making her a practical choice for family adventures or sharing with friends.

Key Configuration - Bali 5.2 for sale 2025:

(AUTOPILOT, SOLAR PANELS, GENERATOR, AC, WATERMAKER, UNDERWATER LIGHTS, GENOA, DISHWASHER, WASHER DRYER, BOW THRUSTER, CODE 0...)

Excellence Pack Specifications:

  • Freshwater purification filter
  • Combined 110 A charger- inverter - 48V/230V - 2x8kVA
  • Battery monitor
  • 2 additional 48V - 130 Ah gel batteries
  • Tender lifting system
  • 1500W Lofrans electric windlass - 48V V for Ø12mm chain
  • Additional 600-litre diesel tank (total capacity of 1,200 litres)
  • Additional 600-litre water (total capacity of 1,320 litres)
  • Aft cockpit shower H/C (Whale twist)
  • Comfort bathing ladder with handrails and wide teak steps
  • 1 electric winch for solent furler and main halyard
  • Forward cockpit upholstery (seats, backrests and 4 lumbar cushions)
  • 634L American fridge/freezer with ice water and ice maker (225L freezer / 409L refrigerator)
  • Gas hob - 3 rings + saucepan clamps
  • Gas oven
  • Bar integrated into the dining area
  • 2 coats of antifouling with epoxy primer as standard
  • Raymarine Electronics Pack: P70S autopilot, AXIOM 7 GPS plotter at the chart table, i70S Multi and VHF RAY 63 at the chart table +  combined VHF RAY MIC at the helm station, AIS transceiver, AXIOM 12" plotter screen at the helm station
  • Management of on-board equipment and energy by multiplexing via a 16" touch-screen interface (replacing the 12V panel with buttons)

Elegance Pack:

  • Hulls: Upholstered headboards and bed surrounds, indirect lighting around beds, designer wall lights, chrome reading lights, magazine racks in master cabin, bathroom comfort accessories, upholstered vanity/desk top + magazine racks
  • Saloon: Upholstered leaves and furniture tops and flexible reading light at the chart table, additional mood lamps, decorative cushions, cover on the saloon table, flagpole

Rigging and Sails:

  • Fully-battened square-top mainsail with specific hardware, Dacron solent with reinforced UV strip + BALI 5.2 lazy bag & lazy jacks
  • 70m² genoa
  • Genoa hardware (sheets, stand-up blocks)
  • 105m² Code 0 with anti-twist cable
  • Code 0 hardware (bowsprit and bowsprit lines, bobstays, furling line, halyard, sheets, drum furler, stand-up block) (optional bulwark winch mandatory)
  • 230m² asymmetric spinnaker with sock
  • Asymmetric spinnaker hardware (bowsprit and lines, bobstays, halyard, sheets, stand-up blocks)  (optional bulwark winch mandatory)
  • 48V electric winch to port for self-tacking solent sheet (replaces manual winch)
  • 2 electric aft bulwark winches for downwind sails
  • Spreader lights (top and bottom)

Mechanical & Safety Equipment:

  • 2 Nanni 115HP engines instead of Yanmar 57HP
  • Kit with 2 additional Balmar  48V alternators (for Nanni 115HP only)
  • "Lithium LifePo4 battery bank - 4x24Vx230Ah (BMS - CBRO - SMART PROTECT) (replaces 6x130Ah gel batteries) (generator required)
  • Pair of folding three-bladed propellers for Nanni N4.115
  • Electric bowthruster in tunnel (48V)
  • 17.5k to 20kVA 220V 50Hz Generator with soundproofing and remote control 230V
  • Full surface solar panel kit (4 156W)
  • Windlass remote control with chain counter at the helm station
  • Safety equipment for 12 people with 1 life raft without EPIRB (lifejackets with harness, 1.85 m lanyard with 2 karabiners, 12-person raft, 10 green glow sticks, horseshoe lifering, automatic lights, buoy and light support, 3 hand flares, 50ZA Iris compass, logbook, torch, 10L bucket, first aid kit).

Comfort Features:

  • Reversible air conditioning for hulls - 60,000 BTU 48V - Lithium option for battery operation, otherwise shore power socket or generator required (mini 20KVA)
  • Opening forward window with adjustable opening for ventilation and locking
  • Low consumption watermaker 48V 240 L/H
  • Large electric freshwater WC
  • Japanese toilets PLANUS RELAX
  • Seawater pump in galley and on deck
  • 1 fan per cabin and forepeak
  • 230V microwave oven (countertop)
  • 12 place setting dishwasher 230 V
  • Washer-dryer 8Kg 230 V

Exterior Fittings:

  • Rigid hardtop with glass panels, indirect LED
  • Plancha grill (gas installation)
  • Blue LED underwater lighting (4 sugarscoop spots)
  • Hydraulic aft platform (max 350 kg)

Electronics & Hifi:

  • Fusion radio with 6 speakers, Bluetooth (saloon, rooftop, forward cockpit)
  • 50” LED TV in saloon (lifting system, terrestrial FR antenna)
  • 1 Camera under port spreader

This Bali 5.2 for sale 2025, NEW and thoughtfully specified, represents a modern, comfortable multihull platform ready for her first owner to set sail. For more details, viewing, or to discuss your preferences, don't hesitate to contact us!
